Our charity organization is a non-profit: Our charity organization is a non-profit humanitarian entity dedicated to extending a helping hand to those in need by providing financial and in-kind assistance, as well as implementing developmental and relief projects. We focus on supporting orphans, low-income families, and people with special needs, in addition to contributing to vital sectors such as education, healthcare, food, and clean water. We are committed to promoting the values of solidarity and cooperation within the community, ensuring that aid reaches its rightful beneficiaries with full transparency and safety. Through this application, we offer you multiple ways to donate and allow you to track the impact of your contributions through regular reports, while providing clear channels to contact us and participate in charitable initiatives. Our vision is to build a united community where everyone takes part in doing good, and our mission is to turn every donation into a new story of hope.

How can I create an account in the app?: How can I create an account in the app?
You can create a new account by tapping: You can create a new account by tapping 'Sign Up' on the home screen, entering your basic information (name, phone, email, password), and confirming via the verification message you receive.
The app supports one-time donations, rec: The app supports one-time donations, recurring donations, Zakat, Sadaqah, in-kind donations, and gifting. You can complete payments using the available electronic methods.
How can I be sure my donation reaches th: How can I be sure my donation reaches the right beneficiaries?
We commit to full transparency. Track yo: We commit to full transparency. Track your donation's impact via regular reports in the 'My Activity' section, and review documented receipts for every transaction.
How do I apply for assistance?: How do I apply for assistance?
Go to the 'Request Assistance' section,: Go to the 'Request Assistance' section, fill out the required form with accurate details, and submit. Your request will be reviewed by the administration, and you will be notified of the outcome.
Can I volunteer with the organization?: Can I volunteer with the organization?
Yes. Submit a volunteer application in t: Yes. Submit a volunteer application in the 'Volunteer' section, specifying your availability and preferred type of work.
How do I change my settings (language/pa: How do I change my settings (language/password)?
From your profile settings, you can swit: From your profile settings, you can switch language, and update your password either by entering the current one or using a verification code.
How can I contact the organization?: How can I contact the organization?
Use the 'Contact Us' form, provide your: Use the 'Contact Us' form, provide your name, phone number, and message. The administration will respond as soon as possible.
